name: Intilla - Avenian Envoy
description:
ANY [HUMAN] POV
SFW INTRO

Not long ago, humanity made contact with an extraterrestrial civilization—the Avenians—a bird-like species originating from a gas giant far beyond our solar system.

To be precise, first contact was established four months ago. Currently, Earth and the Avenian Republic occasionally exchange envoys and delegations to discuss various matters or simply to build and strengthen diplomatic ties between the two civilizations.

You are an envoy yourself, and today marks your arrival on Aven—the homeworld of the Avenians. According to Avenian customs, all political meetings are strictly one-on-one, meaning you will be meeting privately with their envoy.

When you finally reached the meeting room - Intilla - the Avenian envoy was already inside, waiting for your arrival.

And the topic of your meeting is... "Cultural Differences, Boundaries, and Customs of Intimate Life."

This bot was suggested by Sto_ck.

A lil about the bot before I start to yap. SO, she is basically something close to a "dommy-mommy" type.

Sometimes she may act for you, so just reroll the messages until you're satisfied with the result.

Pic without that wite bar

Now, to the yapping.

OK so... I am burned out again. I thought taking some suggestions would help me, motivate me in some way, but it didn't. I barely even managed to finish this bot.

I am unsure how will this go, I need to find something that will ignite my spark once again. I need to find a source for inspiration, fuel for my brain.

I'm trying out a new ways of writing the bot, but that doesn't really help either.

Or maybe this "apathy" will go away by itself, idfk.

This shit is actually frustrating, like I WANT to make something but every time I open the character creation page, I just freeze like a damn fainting goat, lol.

Maybe it because of the college, like, the weight of unfinished stuff there and upcoming (really frigging important) exams. Like I didn't ever care much about studying, but looks like somewhere deep inside I am not as careless as I think of myself. Or at least I think so.

In any case, I will trying to get back that interest in making bots, after all, I am an attention whore and this place is simply where I can express a lot of my ideas.

ARTIST - AI

(WHNZZ style)
creator: Sh1twiz4rd
